current_judgment: Packet 4 is complete. Private customer-pack uploads now have a canonical maintenance gate that proves private corpus readiness, customer-pack library/viewer availability, selected-draft private citation behavior, unselected no-leak behavior, and cleanup through the standard CLI entrypoint.
key_evidence: The new private-lane smoke follows the same build/write/summary.ok contract as maintenance-smoke, so private-lane validation is now a first-class maintenance routine instead of an ad hoc script.
The smoke verifies the required private security envelope and boundary labels on the private corpus manifest before proceeding to book, viewer, chat, and cleanup probes.
Smoke output is redacted down to boundary metadata, counts, and truth labels, so the maintenance report no longer dumps raw ingest payload paths or local artifact layout details.
The canonical CLI now exposes `private-lane-smoke`, and its exit code is driven directly by `summary.ok`, matching the runtime maintenance pattern.
Focused end-to-end temp-server regression plus selected-draft retrieval regressions passed, so packet 4 adds the maintenance gate without regressing packet 3 private retrieval behavior.

validation_results.cli_smoke: fresh temp server with deterministic answerer + patched local embedding models -> play_book_studio.cli private-lane-smoke -> exit_code=0, summary.ok=true, report written to reports/build_logs/private_lane_smoke.json

residual_risks: Intake API responses still expose internal filesystem paths such as uploaded_file_path, capture_artifact_path, canonical_book_path, and private_corpus_manifest_path. Packet 4 removed those paths from the smoke report, but the underlying API redaction remains a separate follow-up.
Retrieval hard scope is still selected-draft PoC scope. tenant_id/workspace_id/pack_version hard scope and placeholder-default rejection are not implemented in this packet.
next_action: Close the customer/private lane hardening sequence here and choose the next axis. If the next axis stays on private boundary hardening, the highest-value follow-up is API payload redaction plus tenant/workspace/pack-version hard scope promotion.
